zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Jewe於1399年出生在英國戴文時，她的父親John le Jewe26歲，母親Alice De Pilsdon24歲。她於大約1419年與Sir John Hody在英國薩默塞特斯塔維爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1473年8月3日在她的家鄉享年74歲，埋葬在英國多瑟特皮爾達。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Jewe于1399年出生在英国戴文时，她的父亲John le Jewe26岁，母亲Alice De Pilsdon24岁。她于大约1419年与Sir John Hody在英国薩默塞特斯塔維爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1473年8月3日在她的家乡享年74岁，埋葬在英国多瑟特皮爾達。

nameMeanings.name: Jewe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon and Cornwall): variant of   Jewell  .

variants.name: Jewell
meanings: English (Devon and Cornwall): from an Old Breton personal name, Iudhael, composed of elements meaning ‘lord’ + ‘generous, bountiful’ (see Jewkes ), which was borne by a 7th-century Christian saint, a king of Brittany who abdicated and spent the last part of his life in a monastery. Forms of this name are found in medieval records not only in Devon and Cornwall, where they are of native origin, but also in East Anglia and even Yorkshire, where they were imported by Bretons after the Norman Conquest. The name was seemingly reintroduced from France in the 17th century by Huguenots.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Jewe was born in 1399, in Devon, England, her father, John le Jewe, was 26 and her mother, Alice De Pilsdon, was 24. She married Sir John Hody about 1419, in Stawell, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 3 August 1473, in her hometown, at the age of 74, and was buried in Pilsdon, Dorset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Jewe est née en 1399, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, John le Jewe, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Alice De Pilsdon, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Hody environ 1419, à Stawell, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 août 1473, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterrée à Pilsdon, Dorset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Jewe 1399 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John le Jewe 26 und ihre Mutter Alice De Pilsdon 24. Sie hat um 1419 in Stawell, Somerset, England Sir John Hody geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. August 1473 im Alter von 74 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Pilsdon, Dorset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Jewe è nata il nel 1399 nel Devon, England, sua padre, John le Jewe, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Alice De Pilsdon, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Hody circa 1419, nel Stawell, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 3 agosto 1473, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolta a Pilsdon, Dorset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Jeweが1399年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父John le Jeweは26歳，母Alice De Pilsdonは24歳であった。約1419年にイギリスソメルセトスタウエルでSir John Hodyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1473年8月3日に故郷で74歳で死去し，イギリスドールセトピルスドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Jewe(이)가 1399년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John le Jewe(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice De Pilsdon(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1419년 영국 서머세트 스타웰에서 Sir John Hody(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1473년 8월 3일 그녀의 고향에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 도르세트 피즈던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Jewe nasceu em 1399, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, John le Jewe, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Alice De Pilsdon, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Hody aproximadamente 1419, em Stawell, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de agosto de 1473, em sua cidade natal, com 74 anos, e foi sepultada em Pilsdon, Dorset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Jewe родилась в 1399 г. в местности девон, Англия, её отцу по имени John le Jewe было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice De Pilsdon, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Hody около 1419 г. в местности ставелл, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 3 августа 1473 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 74 лет и была похоронена в местности пилсдон, дорсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Jewe nació en 1399, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, John le Jewe, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Alice De Pilsdon, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Sir John Hody aproximadamente 1419, en Stawell, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 3 de agosto de 1473, en su pueblo, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultada en Pilsdon, Dorset, Inglaterra.
